projects.name: Guess The Number
projects.description: Multiplayer Discord game grown organically to 13,000,000+ users across 13,000+ servers. Built on a Redis + MongoDB data layer with a Bull.js queue system to keep command latency low under high-volume concurrent traffic.

projects.name: Frosted Studios
projects.description: Studio website for a top Roblox game studio with 1.6B+ total visits. Features live game stats pulled from the Roblox Open Cloud API (CCU, visit counts), a contact system with email delivery, and a showcase of the studio's game portfolio.

projects.name: Dorm Room Viewer
projects.description: Web platform for 9,000+ Columbia students to preview residence halls. AWS S3-backed image delivery, NextAuth.js role-based access for verified Columbia accounts, and a real-time admin panel for Housing staff to manage content.

projects.name: Dine U
projects.description: Cross-platform dining companion app for university students with real-time dining hall menus, an ML recommendation system trained on user preferences, and serverless APIs deployed on Supabase Edge Functions.

projects.name: Blogify
projects.description: 1st place winner among 75+ participants at a TikTok-sponsored hackathon. A real-time blogging platform with infinite scroll, live updates, and features focused on customization, accessibility, and community engagement.

projects.name: SaaS Template
projects.description: A sleek, modern Next.js landing page template for showcasing SaaS products or services with customizable sections and a responsive design.

projects.name: Discord Metric System
projects.description: A real-time metric collection and visualization system built with the MERN stack to process and visualize Discord server data with high performance.

projects.name: Whack-A-Mole
projects.description: A real-time interactive Whack-A-Mole game that integrates hardware with a dynamic React.js interface using WebSocket communication and physical sensors.

projects.name: Inventory Tracking
projects.description: A full-featured inventory management system that enables real-time tracking and management of stock levels with a sleek UI and efficient backend.
